content.text: Fix the authentication bug in our API — users are getting 401 errors on the /api/users endpoint.
I'll look at the API auth code.
export function authMiddleware(req, res, next) { const token = req.headers.authorization; if (!token) return res.status(401).send('Unauthorized'); next(); }
Found the auth middleware. Let me check the route handler.
import { authMiddleware } from '../auth/middleware'; router.get('/api/users', authMiddleware, async (req, res) => { const users = await db.users.findAll(); res.json(users); });
Checking the token validation logic.
export async function validateToken(token) { try { const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET); return decoded; } catch { return null; } }
I see the issue — middleware checks for token presence but never calls validateToken. Let me also check the test.
describe('authMiddleware', () => { it('should return 401 without token', () => {}); it('should call next with valid token', () => {}); });
Now fixing the middleware to actually validate the token.

input.content: import { validateToken } from './validate-token'; export async function authMiddleware(req, res, next) { const token = req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', ''); if (!token) return res.status(401).send('Unauthorized'); const decoded = await validateToken(token); if (!decoded) return res.status(401).send('Invalid token'); req.user = decoded; next(); }

input.content: describe('authMiddleware', () => { it('returns 401 without token', () => {}); it('returns 401 with invalid token', () => {}); it('calls next with valid token', () => {}); });

Let me check the docs too to update the API documentation.

# Authentication
All API endpoints require a valid session token passed in the Authorization header.
Updating the auth docs with the JWT validation details.

input.content:
# Authentication
All API endpoints require a valid JWT token passed as Bearer token in the Authorization header.

## Token Format
Authorization: Bearer <jwt-token>

## Error Responses
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token
